name: Plastic SCM
description: Plastic SCM — Centralized and distributed version control system optimized for large game development teams with binary assets.

seo.title: Plastic SCM — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Plastic SCM: Plastic SCM — Centralized and distributed version control system optimized for large game development teams with binary assets.

when_to_use: Centralized VCS for large game binary asset management
Distributed mode for offline game dev workflows
Branch and merge visualization for large game teams
Unity and Unreal Engine pipeline integration

pros: Handles huge binary assets better than Git LFS
Strong branching and merging UI for artists
Centralized and distributed modes in one tool
Good fit for game studios and Unity workflows
cons: Acquired and rebranded multiple times, roadmap uncertain
Commercial licensing, no meaningful free tier for teams
CI integrations lag Git's universal support
review.verdict: Still the best VCS for binary-heavy game studios, but with real concerns about Unity's stewardship.
review.best_for: Game studios and VFX teams with large binary assets and mixed dev/artist teams.
review.not_for: Pure software teams where Git + LFS is entirely sufficient.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
